description_long: This is a rectangular first-aid kit box with a sturdy, hard shell exterior. The top surface is white and prominently features a red cross symbol alongside the bold text 'FIRST AID KIT', making it easily identifiable in emergencies. The lower portion of the box is a muted red, contrasting with the white lid, and the front side includes a white handle and two visible latches for secure closure. The box appears to be made of durable plastic, suitable for protecting medical supplies inside. There are no transparent panels, so the contents are not visible from the outside. The overall design is utilitarian and highly visible, ideal for quick access in urban environments.
description: A rectangular, hard-shelled first-aid kit with a white lid featuring a red cross and 'FIRST AID KIT' label, and a red base with a white handle and latches.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white lid with red cross and 'FIRST AID KIT' text, plus a white handle and two latches on the red base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the white lid and red base, with the red cross and text partially visible on the top.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain white lid and red base, with no visible handle or latches.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the white lid and red base, with the red cross and text partially visible.
